---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Money Manager India
title: "[FEATURE] Brief description of the feature"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of what the feature should do.

## Motivation

Why do you need this feature? What problem does it solve?

- Is this a pain point you experience regularly?
- How would this improve your money management experience?
- Are there similar features in other applications?

## Use Case

Describe a specific scenario where this feature would be useful:

**Scenario:**
As a user, I want to [do something] so that [benefit/outcome].

**Example:**
As a user with multiple investments, I want to track their performance automatically so that I can monitor my portfolio growth without manual updates.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this feature should work. Include any UI/UX suggestions if applicable.

### Implementation Details (Optional)

If you have technical suggestions for how this could be implemented:

- Database schema changes needed
- New API endpoints required
- UI components to create
- Integration with existing features

## Relevance to Indian Users

How does this feature specifically benefit Indian users? Consider:

- Indian tax implications
- Indian financial products (e.g., PPF, NPS)
- Regional payment methods (UPI, NEFT, RTGS)
- Local financial regulations
- Common Indian financial practices

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches to solve this problem?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here. For example:

- Similar features in other finance apps
- Screenshots or wireframes of the proposed feature
- Links to relevant financial tools or resources
- Related GitHub issues or discussions

## Priority

- [ ] Critical (blocks other features or heavily impacts experience)
- [ ] High (would be very valuable)
- [ ] Medium (would be nice to have)
- [ ] Low (nice to have, lower priority)

## Effort Estimate

How much effort do you think this would require?

- [ ] Small (1-2 days of development)
- [ ] Medium (3-5 days)
- [ ] Large (1-2 weeks)
- [ ] Very Large (2+ weeks)

## Would You Help?

- [ ] Yes, I'd be willing to submit a pull request for this feature
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to be kept updated on progress
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting the idea

---

Thank you for your feature request! Your ideas help us make Money Manager India better for Indian users.
